sizing_rule.note: Anti-martingale: increase position size by 1.5x multiplier as equity grows (current_equity/initial_equity ratio); reduce by 0.9x during losing streaks only if drawdown exceeds 15% threshold. Base risk is 2% per trade. Never increase during drawdowns.

source_rule_text: Position size should increase as account equity grows, never decrease during losing streaks; use anti-martingale position sizing scaled to account size rather than martingale strategies that increase risk during drawdowns.
